task: Using only the provided embedded packet, calculate all derived fields, classify each record against the named thresholds exactly, rank governing risks, and recommend the smallest sufficient remediation action within the remediation budget. Produce two deliverables: waf_diff_test_plan.md (with formulas, executable logic or clearly-stated calculation steps, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table) and payload_matrix.csv (row-level data and formulas or reproducible logic). Do not invent or impute inputs, do not use outside data, and mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Trigger expert-review flag if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift.
